signals.raw:
Ripple's Four-Phase XRPL Quantum-Resistant Roadmap Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple announced on April 20, 2026, a detailed four-phase plan to make the XRP Ledger (XRPL) quantum-ready by 2028, with Phase 3 testing hybrid post-quantum signatures starting H2 2026, positioning XRPL ahead of Bitcoin and Ethereum timelines[2][4].
